name: hive-mind
description: A plugin built for agent interactions with the hive-mind knowledge system.

vault_path.title: Vault Path
vault_path.description: Absolute path to your hive-mind Obsidian vault (e.g. /Users/you/code/hive-mind)

author_name.title: Author Name
author_name.description: Your display name as it appears in people/ notes (e.g. Jane Smith)
